snippet.title: CG5 - Wrong Side Out (from Poppy Playtime: Chapter 5)
snippet.description:
STREAM NOW: https://cg5.lnk.to/wrongsideout

Song by @CG5
Guitars by Josh Locke

Animation & Production Team:

Kaylin Radomski (https://x.com/KaylinYGO)
Director, Storyboarding, Animator, Layout, Cleanup, and Lighting

Animator and Layout

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I made us a home,
From what was once a prison.
So if you share my vision,
Thank me, dear, for paradise.

And in the hour of joy,
Don’t bite the hand that feeds you, child.
Or do I have to fix you?
‘Cuz once I do, you’ll never die.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

(A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.
A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.)

I gave us new life,
Through reanimation.
But you brought an outlier to my equation,
So shall we see what you look like?

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.
I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.
(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

You can’t burn down all that we are,
Or turn around,
This is the start of my immortal perfection.
And I’m your God.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

Make yourself look perfect
For our last goodbye 
Standing there with flowers 
As we rest in peace
You won't ever see me cry

All of the nights
All of the times
That I stood up for you 
All of the lies
Loving is blind 
I couldn't see the truth 
All the shit I did to pull us out the grave 
All the shit I did, you'd never do the same

Now we're standing in the kitchen 
With you begging me to listen 
But I've learnt your language well enough to read you 
So you switched up the positions
Played the victim, now you listen 
But my blood is cold so it's too late to redo

Make yourself look perfect 
For our last goodbye 
Standing there with flowers 
As we rest in peace
You won't ever see me cry

Go put on your suit & tie
praying for forgiveness
Boy you out of time 
Standing there with flowers 
As we're buried deep
You'll be mourning me 
‘Til the end of time
For your whole damn life
Better go put on your suit & tie

You put on a show
Curtains are closed
Not a word you can say
Playing my heart 
Was only a part
Of all your twisted games
Faking all your tears like you're keeping score 
Were you faking all the years to win some dumb award 

Cuz now we're standing in the kitchen 
With you begging me to listen 
But I've learnt your language well enough to read you 
So you switched up the positions
Played the victim
Now you listen 
It's already over
I don't need closure
Found my composure

You won't ever see me cry

You'll be mourning me 
Till the end of time
For your whole damn life
Better go put on your suit & tie

Hey
All your pleading worked until I saw a change
And you drove the hearse that held my body’s cage
As you turned us to nothing
And dust fell on trusting
The sorry is late

Go put on your suit & tie
Make yourself look perfect 
For our last goodbye 
Standing there with flowers 
As we rest in peace
You won't ever see me cry

Go put on your suit & tie
Praying for forgiveness, boy you out of time

snippet.title: Oasis - Don't Look Back In Anger (Official 30th Anniversary Visualiser)
snippet.description:
Official visualiser for 'Don’t Look Back in Anger', celebrating 30 years since the single’s release on February 19, 1996. The track features on Oasis’ era-defining album '(What’s The Story) Morning Glory?', which celebrated its 30th anniversary on October 2nd, 2025.
 
To mark the anniversary, Big Brother Recordings released new deluxe formats on October 3rd, featuring unplugged versions of classic tracks 'Cast No Shadow', 'Morning Glory', 'Wonderwall', 'Acquiesce' and Champagne Supernova'.

The anniversary edition is available now on limited-edition 2CD, 3LP and digital formats.
Order here: https://oasismusic.lnk.to/30wtsmgID

Video credit: Chris Curtis at I’m Your Boss films

Lyrics:

Slip inside the eye of your mind
Don’t you know you might find
A better place to play
You said that you’d never been
But all the things that you’ve seen
Will slowly fade away

So I’ll start a revolution from my bed
‘Cos you said the brains I had went to my head
Step outside, summertime’s in bloom
Stand up beside the fireplace
Take that look from off your face
You ain’t ever gonna burn my heart out

And so Sally can wait, she knows it’s too late as we’re walking on by
Her soul slides away, “But don’t look back in anger,” I heard you say

Take me to the place where you go
Where nobody knows if it’s night or day
Please don’t put your life in the hands
Of a Rock ‘n’ Roll band
Who’ll throw it all away

I’m gonna start a revolution from my bed
‘Cos you said the brains I had went to my head
Step outside ’cause summertime’s in bloom
Stand up beside the fireplace, take that look from off your face
‘Cos you ain’t ever gonna burn my heart out

And so Sally can wait
She knows it’s too late as she’s walking on by
My soul slides away
“But don’t look back in anger,” I heard you say

So Sally can wait
She knows it’s too late as we’re walking on by
Her soul slides away
“But don’t look back in anger,” I heard you say

So Sally can wait
She knows it’s too late as she’s walking on by
My soul slides away
“But don’t look back in anger, don’t look back in anger.”
I heard you say, “at least not today.”

#oasis #DLBIA #dontlookbackinanger #WTSMG

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: YUNGBLUD - Suburban Requiem (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
YUNGBLUD's album 'Idols (Complete)’ is out now: https://YUNGBLUD.lnk.to/IdolsCompleteID

Shop YUNGBLUD’s store now: https://yungblud.lnk.to/officialshopID

Discord: https://YUNGBLUD.lnk.to/discord

Producer: Justin Kaminuma
Director: Justin Kaminuma

Lyrics:
Slow down, you mad enough to have it figured out?
Longing for that stale ambition
Looking to be found
Everybody knows they’re special ‘til they look around
Have you closed your eyes lately?
Listened to the sounds

Don’t hide
Don’t fight it
Don’t cry
No lying
Don’t hide
Don’t fight it
You know I’m gonna be right here next to you

In all the places that you go
In the sunlight and the snow
You know I’m gonna be right here next to you
In every dream you try to be
Every time you don’t believe
You know I’m gonna be right here next to you

It’s a suburban requiem so stick around
And you’ll begin to feel yourself lift off the ground

When you were small they called you useless
They took the laces from your shoes
You never learned quite how to process
You saw their pain and felt confused

But give it time
When you feel yourself about to lose control
Give it time
Feel yourself lifting off the floor

Don’t hide
Don’t fight it
Don’t cry
No lying
Don’t hide
Don’t fight it
You know I’m gonna be right here next to you

It’s a suburban requiem so stick around
(Don’t come down, don’t come down)
And you’ll begin to feel yourself lift off the ground
(Don’t come down, don’t come down)

#YUNGBLUD #IdolsComplete #Idols #SuburbanRequiem

snippet.title: The Yeti - Official Trailer (2026)
snippet.description:
Take a look at the Official Trailer for The Yeti, a monster horror film distributed by Well Go USA Entertainment. A brick night brings a sinister monster out from the shadows in The Yeti, in select theaters and digital on April 10.

Merriell Sunday Sr. and Hollis Bannister vanished in Alaska. Ellie and Merriell Jr. mount a search, but an ancient threat stalks their expedition into the wilderness, hunting them as they seek the truth behind the disappearances.

The Yeti stars Brittany Allen, Eric Nelsen, Jim Cummings, Christina Bennett Lind, Linc Hand, with William Sadler and Corbin Bernsen. The film is directed and written by Gene Gallerano and William Pisciotta.

The Yeti is in select theaters and digital on April 10.

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] The Sun From Another Star อาทิตย์ดาวตก | STUDIO WABI SABI
snippet.description:
FOUREVER YOU PART 2 | THE SUN FROM ANOTHER STAR

ดาวตกเกิดมาพร้อมพลังพิเศษที่สามารถอ่านความรู้สึก อ่านชะตา รวมทั้งสื่อสารกับวิญญาณได้ ชีวิตนักศึกษาอันแสนเรียบง่ายของเขาดูจะผ่านพ้นไปได้ด้วยดีจนกระทั่งย้ายไปอยู่คอนโดใหม่ที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าผีดุ นอกจากจะมีวิญญาณมาป่วนไม่ขาดสายแล้ว ดาวตกยังต้องรับมือกับอาทิตย์ พี่หมอข้างห้องที่ชอบหาเรื่องมาให้ปวดหัวอยู่ตลอด นั่นจึงเป็นจุดเริ่มต้นที่ทำให้ชีวิตอันสงบสุขของดาวตกได้เปลี่ยนไปตลอดกาล

ทุกวันพุธ เวลา 20.30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 
และเวอร์ชัน UNCUT บนแอป WeTV ที่เดียวเท่านั้น 
เริ่มตอนแรก 4 มีนาคมนี้

นำแสดงโดย
เงิน อนุภาษ เหลืองสดใส
โอ๊ต ธาราธร พุ่มโพธิงาม
พาย ศรัณวุฒิ นิตยสุทธิ
กอล์ฟ พสธร เลิศสถิตย์วงศ์
บีเวอร์ พรรษพล เจนสรรพกิจกุล
ต้นหลิว เมธาพัฒน์ ฉิมกุล
ปอนด์ พลวิชญ์ เกตุประภากร
เอิร์ธ กัษมนณัฏฐ์ นามวิโรจน์ 
แม็กกี้ รชต พิเชฐโชติ
บาส หัสณัฐ พินิวัตร์

snippet.title: TRAILER: Doctor Who The TV Movie in 4K! Coming Soon...
snippet.description:
30 years since its first transmission, the Doctor Who TV Movie starring Paul McGann and Sylvester McCoy as the Doctor is back as you've never seen it before!
 
Meticulously re-scanned from the original film prints, the TV Movie has been restored to full 4K Ultra High Definition and will be coming to 4K and Blu Ray disc soon.
 
READ MORE: https://bbc.in/3ZGu7kr
 
Starring: Paul McGann, Sylvester McCoy, Eric Roberts, Daphne Ashbrook and Yee Jee Tso

Subscribe to Doctor Who for more exclusive videos:  https://bbc.in/SubscribeToDoctorWho

Explore our full range of exclusive Doctor Who merchandise here: https://bbc.in/DWShop
 
WATCH MORE: 
Compilations: https://bbc.in/DWCompilations
Regenerations: https://bbc.in/DWRegenerations
Title Sequences: https://bbc.in/DWTitleSequences
The Whoniverse Show: https://bbc.in/TheWhoniverseShow
New to Who: https://bbc.in/DWNewToWho
Official Podcast: https://bbc.in/DWOfficialPodcast

Welcome to the Doctor Who Channel! Step inside the TARDIS and embark on an epic journey through time and space. From the Doctor's first adventure in 1963 through countless regenerations, here you will find iconic moments, behind the scenes footage, exclusive content and more! This is the ultimate destination for all things from the Whoniverse.
